meta.tagline: Find the right therapist for you
meta.description: Discover trusted psychologists and psychotherapists in your city. Filter by specialty, city, and session type to find the right match.

home.heroTitle: Find the right therapist for you
home.heroSubtitle: Browse hundreds of vetted psychologists by specialty, city, and session type. Take the first step today.
home.featuredSubtitle: Top-rated specialists currently accepting new clients.
home.valueTitle: Finding the right therapist shouldn't be hard
home.value1Body: Every psychologist is listed with their credentials and area of practice.
home.value2Body: Filter by anxiety, depression, couples therapy, CBT and more.
home.value3Body: Pick the format that suits you — get support regardless of city.
home.ctaBody: Find a therapist that matches your needs and reach out directly.

lead.title: Get in touch
lead.subtitle: Your message goes directly to the therapist. This site does not guarantee an appointment.
lead.name: Your name
lead.messagePlaceholder: Briefly tell the therapist why you're reaching out...
lead.success: The therapist will get back to you shortly.
lead.error: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.
lead.validation: Please fill in all required fields.

footer.disclaimer: Terapimap is not a healthcare provider. We connect individuals with independent specialists.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
